description: Beautiful FULLY DETACHED townhome in the boutique Nuvo complex,backing onto a private south-facing greenbelt w/a fully fenced backyard & private patio.The main floor features an open-concept living space w/a gas fireplace, large south facing windows to the patio & an entertainer's kitchen w/stone countertops,ss appliances.A versatile flex room on the main level works as a bedroom or home office & offers a separate entrance next to a full 3 pc bathroom. In-floor radiant heating throughout the main floor adds comfort. Upstairs offers 3 spacious bedrooms plus a flex space ideal for a sitting area or study.The generous primary bedroom retreat looks out at the greenbelt, large w/in closet & spa like ensuite.Located steps from Morgan Creek Golf Course,Grandview shopping,schools & Hwy 99 access.
